title: Human Empowerment in an AI Society
summary: Human Empowerment in an AI Society
whyItMatters: Thanks to Benjamin Schmidt and Luke McNally for the discussions around this topic and their feedback on an early draft of this article! Gradual disempowerment is one of the central failure modes of advanced AI.
